title: Tanishq Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tanishq Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tanishq Global Group! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tanishq Global Group:
Tanishq Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tanishq Global Group!
